columns.extraction_plan: The number and percentage of participants with a Performance Status (PS) score of 0 in the treatment arm are not reported in the provided PDF. While "WHO performance status (0 vs 1 or 2)" is mentioned as a stratification factor in the "Randomisation and masking" section (page 4), the actual counts or percentages for each arm are not presented in Table 1 (Baseline characteristics) or the results text.
